Docs.summary:
Creates or updates JWT authenticator in the managed cluster and updates the managed cluster to apply the settings.
Request Path. /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ContainerService/managedClusters/{resourceName}/jwtAuthenticators/{jwtAuthenticatorName}.
Operation Id. JWTAuthenticators_CreateOrUpdate.
Default Api Version. 2026-01-02-preview.
Docs.exception: is an empty string, and was expected to be non-empty.
